abilities.name: Return Fire (Mask)
abilities.description: After succeeding at Defense/Willpower duel, attacker suffers damage from readied Pistol weapon. Damage flip receives -.

abilities.name: Always Ready
abilities.description: May take Ready Weapon Action immediately after flipping Initiative.

abilities.name: Gunfighter
abilities.description: May use Pistols as if Range y2.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.description: May choose to ignore one Critical Effect per Dramatic Time.

actions: (1) Custom Pistol (Pistol) | AV: 6 (12) | Rg: z12 or y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. If Rapid Fire, +2 to final duel total. Capacity 8, Reload 0. Tome Piercing: Ignores Armor/Hard to Wound. Mask Experimental: 2/4/6 damage. Ram Explosive: +B to Moderate/Severe. Crow Cavity: + to damage.
(2) Rapid Fire | Discard Twist Card to take three 1 AP attacks with Ranged weapon vs single target.
system.notes: Elite troubleshooters of M&SU. Carry heavily modified pistols with specialized ammunition. Reputation alone often resolves conflicts. Devastating when pressed.
